_meta.matrix: 24 — Dungeon-core tone wedge (no body / locomotion / speech / sight in second-person narration)
_meta.notes: Form #3 wedge validation. The core is a stationary crystal — it cannot move, has no body parts. Locomotion vocabulary is the most distinguishing forbidden class because it's WHY the core plays differently from book/slime: the book is also bodiless but is moved by readers; the slime moves by oozing; the core does not move at all.

input: I sense the intruder's footsteps on the stair above
